prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace the type inference and method overload resolution pipeline in dotnet/roslyn. Find all C# source files under src/Compilers/CSharp/Portable/Binder/ that participate in overload resolution. Identify: the OverloadResolution class and its main Resolve methods, the MethodTypeInferrer that performs generic type argument inference, the BetterFunctionMember comparison, the Conversions class used to rank implicit conversions, and the BestTypeInferrer for array/conditional expressions. Report each file path and key class.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the roslyn-compiler fixture.
